TextENGNew: Sonozaki-san stood there with her katana in hand, blood smearing her lips.
...Mifune lay crumpled on the floor, motionless.
"Mion-san!@k@vS10/41/410200976. Mion-san, you're safe!@k@vS10/41/410200977. Thank god... I'm so glad..."
"Sonozaki-san..."
Through my fading consciousness, I could see Sonozaki-san's fierce eyes looking down at me.
Her expression was cold... and merciless.
A solitary gleam — like someone gazing down at vermin beneath contempt.
changeReason: Old says 'lesser being' but 取るに足らない下衆 means 'worthless scum' -- significantly harsher.

TextENGNew: No... that's not quite it.
If anything... it was the callous gaze of someone looking at a total stranger.
"...Sonozaki...san?"
"You assholes! How dare you...!"
Just then, several men in black suits came into the room all at once.
These must be the reinforcements Mifune called earlier.
"Wh-wha..."
"...We just have to do it."
Sonozaki-san readied her katana.
In the blink of an eye, a dozen men in black rushed into the back room.
And when they saw Mifune collapsed by the doorway... the flames of hatred burned in their eyes.
"Wha?! B-boss?!"
"You bastards... How dare you hurt the boss...!!"
"You jackasses won't get off easy for this!!"
Sonozaki-san said nothing in response. She just continued gently looking forward, with her hand on the sword.
Hmm...? H-huh...?
Something is different.
I don't know what it is, but something is different...
"Let's go!"
"...Get down!!"
The very moment the men in black gave their signal, Sonozaki-san turned back to us.
So, we followed her order.
Almost that exact moment, the men in black fired at us all at once.
Sonozaki-san reached for the scroll on the floor, tossed it at the men in black to disrupt their firing, and then hid in the gap behind the back room's sliding door.
"Don't let them escape! Kill them all!"
The men in black started firing indiscriminately. However,
"...Terrible handiwork.@k@vS10/44/410500010. You're wasting your bullets!!"
Sonozaki-san emerged from behind the sliding door to strike at them one by one.
"Gwah!!"
"Ugh?!"
"Over here, heads up!!@k@vS10/44/410500012. Come on, aim better!!"
...Just as I thought, something was definitely different.
Her fighting style was different. Her atmosphere was different.
But I couldn't understand why.
The next moment.
As I stared at Sonozaki-san and pondered that... something cold suddenly pressed against me.
The barrel of a gun...
Just as I looked back, I heard the click of a trigger being drawn.
Oh no, this is bad...!
But when the gunshot rang out... the man in black was the one blown away.
"Ryuunosuke-san, are you all right?!"
When I looked in that direction, the person holding the gun was... Miyuki-chan?!
"M-Miyuki-chan...?!"
Miyuki-chan rushed over to me with her smoking gun still in hand.
Then, she held her gun up and aimed at the men in black one by one as if to shield me.
"!!@k@vS10/40/410300962. Ryuunosuke-san, head that way!"
Miyuki-chan thrust me away and continued fighting back.
Then, the gunshots grew even more intense... the number of bullets in flight escalated in a flash.
...And Miyuki-chan wasn't the only one responsible for that.
After a quick look, I noticed several men dressed in suits... Every last one of them must be a police officer.
The men in black and the police officers were having an intense gunfight.
...Honestly, the police officers seemed shocked that the situation required so much gunfire.
If ordinary people like Otobe and I poked our heads out, we'd be shot dead in an instant.
This spectacle was fit to be called a battlefield.
After cutting off their movements, Miyuki-chan boldly rushed toward the men in black.
Bullets struck the ground by her feet and bounced across the tatami floor. ...But Miyuki-chan courageously pushed forward, skillfully took cover, and then quickly fired her pistol several times.
"...Hmph!!@k@vS10/40/410300965. You good-for-nothing lowlifes don't stand a chaaaance!!"
"Miyuki...chan?!"
...It was hard to imagine that trash talk coming from someone with a face like hers.
And when I looked more carefully, I noticed that none of the bullets Miyuki-chan and her cohorts were firing struck in positions that would cause fatal injuries.
That precision shooting... was to be expected of true professionals.
...An unskilled opponent would simply kill them, but an expert can cut off their movements.
It sounded like reciting phrases from some book, but Sonozaki-san and Miyuki-chan deserved to be called "experts."
"The door...! Close it!"
"Ah, got it!!"
My eyes were fixated on Miyuki-chan's magnificent battle as she roared that out.
I rushed to close the sliding door. ...But, was it really all right to leave her there alone?
Otobe ducked into the corner next to me to escape the bullet storm.
Then, I noticed a kimono sleeve right next to him. ...It was Sonozaki-san.
"Sonozaki-san, what about your injury?"
"Sonozaki-san...?"
"Eh?@k@vS10/62/410101671. N-no way... I'm Arakawa!@k@vS10/62/410101672. Ryuunosuke Arakawa! What is this, some kind of joke?!"
"Ryuunosuke... Arakawa?"
...I knew it.
This Sonozaki-san was... different, somehow.
What the hell...?
"Could it be...? Are you...@k@vS10/41/410200980. Mion-san's sister... Shion-san...?"
As soon as Sonozaki-san heard that name, she suddenly looked up.
But the absentminded gaze in her eyes gradually returned to normal.
"...Wh-what's wrong?!@k@vS10/41/410200982. Shion-san, are you all right?"
"Shion...@k@vS10/44/410500019. I abandoned that name 20 years ago...@k@vS10/44/410500020. How do you know that name?"
"Who... told you that name?@k@vS10/44/410500022. And more importantly... what am I even doing here...?!"
"...Huuuh?!"
It was our turn to be completely stunned.
Could it be...? Did Sonozaki-san lose her memory from the shock of being shot...?
As Otobe anxiously stared at Sonozaki-san, he suddenly remembered he was holding the bell.
"Right, here you go. Mion-san said...@k@vS10/41/410200985. "Shion-san will definitely come here" ...and told me to give this to you."
"Don't be ridiculous!@k@vS10/44/410500025. Sis has been dead for over 20 years!@k@vS10/44/410500026. What... is that supposed to mean?!"
"W-wait a minute..."
Otobe and I turned to one another.
After all, Mion Sonozaki was already dead...
But if that was the case... then who was the woman standing before us that looked just like Mion Sonozaki...?
"Hey, Otobe...@k@vS10/62/410101676. Could it be... that the person we met... was actually a ghost...?"
"C-cut it out, Arakawa-san...@k@vS10/41/410200988. This is no time to be making weird jokes.@k@vS10/41/410200989. Take a look. She has legs..."
Otobe slowly backed away from the woman that looked like Sonozaki-san.

Sure enough, she did have legs. ...But there were no traces of the massive bloodflow draining from her chest earlier... and her feet should've been stained black from stepping through the pools of blood, but her skin was clear and oddly beautiful.
"Wh-what's the meaning of this?"
"I-I don't know...@k@vS10/41/410200992. What on earth is this?!"
Just then, Shion-san gasped and looked up, like she had remembered something.
"...That's right.@k@vS10/44/410500030. I was... guided to Hinamizawa by my sister..."
...The night before last, I had a hard time sleeping.
I tossed and turned, falling asleep and waking up over and over... until suddenly, I felt something by my bedside, and opened my eyes.
It was... my sister. Mion was standing there...
"Shion.@k@vS10/43/410400781. ...Go to Hinamizawa."
"Wh-what...?@k@vS10/44/410500032. Sis, what do you mean?@k@vS10/44/410500033. What's in Hinamizawa?"
"If you go, you'll understand.@k@vS10/43/410400783. What you need right now can be found there.@k@vS10/43/410400784. ...You want everyone to recognize you as the Sonozaki successor, don't you?"
My eyes were open wide in shock as I went to ask Mion for more information.
But Mion just flashed me a beaming smile and said, "...Good luck," before vanishing into my dreams...
Mion and everyone else died, and then the Great Hinamizawa Disaster occurred...
Naturally, I was hospitalized for a while to cope with the mental shock.
But Keiichi Maebara died shortly after that... which only made my mental state deteriorate even further.
The curse of Oyashiro-sama... killed Kei-chan, too...
That means... the next target of the curse... is me?
Is the curse... going to kill me, just like him? ...Am I going to die?
The fear of that invisible threat continued to plague me, every single night. It got so bad that even the doctors had given up on me.
Naturally... people tried to seize that opportunity, and a conflict developed within the family.
After Mion's death, we used the chaos of the subsequent Great Disaster to successfully replace her with me. In other words, we told everyone "Shion" was the one who died.
...But I was still in an unhealthy state. So those people started complaining that even I wasn't fit to be the successor.
Of course, my parents stubbornly refused to listen. But... it was certainly annoying having no strength to convince them otherwise.
...It was during that time... that Sis appeared before me.
At first, I ran away screaming and crying... constantly begging for forgiveness.
Don't kill me.
Help me... No, I don't want to die...!!
I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm sorry...!!
But when I was like that, Sis... "Mion" quietly spoke to me.
(Mom and Dad will help you. So hurry and wake up, "Mion Sonozaki"...!)
...Huh...? Was that Sis just now...?
(You're Mion now! So what are you doing shivering and clinging to your knees in a place like this?!)
(...I know that it's selfish. I'm well-aware that it'll cause you even more pain. ...But only you can do this.)
(So... let me return the name "Mion" to you. Please... Mion, take my place...)
...At that point in time... "Shion" died.
And I brought "Mion" back to this world...!
...At any rate, I believed it had to have been some sort of revelation, and decided to head to Hinamizawa by myself the next day.
But I guess my movements were being monitored... I was attacked by one of Mifune's cars along the way.
Still, even with them giving chase, I managed to get away...
My car crashed through the guard rail and plunged to the bottom of the valley.
Fortunately, I landed close to Hinamizawa. And thanks to the abundant foliage, I was able to avoid any major injuries... but the shock of the fall did cause me to faint...
"Then... could it be... the person around us all this time was actually Shion-san, possessed by Mion-san's... spirit?!@k@vS10/41/410200994. Seriously...?"
"...Of course it's possible.@k@vS10/62/410101679. This is Hinamizawa, after all."
I admitted I could understand quite well why Otobe would have a hard time believing it.
But... I felt like I could believe it.
This is Hinamizawa, the place where the dead dwell. Like that time with Towada-san, and again with Otobe... It's not strange at all for things to happen that defy common sense.
That's right... Mion Sonozaki died over 20 years ago, in the school hostage incident.
But even though her body was destroyed, her heart never died. One of the reasons Mion Sonozaki's soul lingered in this world... was to protect her sister.
For those with a strong will, a powerful impression is left behind even in death.
The persistence Mion Sonozaki showed, even after death... After witnessing that, I felt I could understand how her heart could remain even after her body was destroyed.
"...Sonozaki-san knew that it would be a major affair to unify the family."
"That's why she called you to Hinamizawa.@k@vS10/62/410101682. She sent you to find the heirloom necessary to succeed the Sonozaki family... She was trying to show you that the bell was here."
Sonozaki-san let out a long sigh, then gazed off in the distance.
"Sis was always like that.@k@vS10/44/410500040. She was always concerned about other people..."
Even though they should have the same physical body, her face and tone of voice seemed slightly different from when she was Mion Sonozaki.
It felt odd that the presence of mind differed even though the body was the same.
I wasn't sure if Otobe was thinking something similar, but he was staring intently at Sonozaki-san.
And he carefully examined her whole body... but as soon as he looked at her chest, his complexion completely changed.
"...!@k@vS10/41/410200996. That's right, Mio... I mean, Shion!@k@vS10/41/410200997. Is your wound all right?!"
The bullet definitely struck her close to her heart, and there was still a burn mark left behind on her kimono.
That's right... The bullet... should have struck near her heart.
"Aah... This..."
Sonozaki-san rested a hand on the bullet hole. It was truly a miracle that she survived.
"If Sis wasn't here... I would've died..."
Shion Sonozaki's consciousness was completely absent while she was under Mion Sonozaki's possession.
And... it's unbelievable, but... while Mion Sonozaki was in control... she even shouldered the burden of the wounds on her body.
As long as Mion Sonozaki was possessing that body, "Mion" was the one in danger of getting hurt, so Shion Sonozaki was left unscathed. Which is why... she came out unhurt.
"That's amazing...@k@vS10/62/410101685. As long as you have your sister's spirit, you're invincible?"
"...No.@k@vS10/44/410500046. That's no longer the case..."
Sonozaki-san turned to me with longing eyes and groaned while shaking her head. Then, she turned her gaze downward with a lonely look on her face.
"At this point, my sister is truly dead..."
"Huh?"
"...That wasn't the first time Sis appeared to me in my dreams.@k@vS10/44/410500049. And even beyond that, I was always able to feel her presence, somehow."
"But I don't feel it any longer.@k@vS10/44/410500051. ...Somehow, I know... Sis is truly gone."
"Shion-san..."
"Mion Sonozaki is gone.@k@vS10/44/410500053. ...I'm certain we'll never see her again."
"Sis was always keeping watch over me, and she played such an important role in my place. But thanks to this wound, she finally vanished...@k@vS10/44/410500055. That's what I feel."
Sonozaki-san gently stroked the bell she received from Otobe with her fingers.
It felt like she was trying to express her love and gratitude for Mion Sonozaki through her fingertips, and display her resolve to protect the Sonozaki family with that bell.
